name: Members Financial
description_short: Members Financial FCU is a federally chartered credit union serving the Midland, Texas area since 1940, offering checking, savings, loans, and business accounts to members.
description_long: Members Financial Federal Credit Union was established in 1940 as a service organization for Shell Oil Company employees in the Permian Basin. Over the decades, it has evolved into a full-service community credit union. In 2008, the organization expanded significantly by acquiring Sid Richardson Credit Union, positioning itself as a comprehensive financial institution for the broader Midland community rather than a single employer group. The credit union offers a wide range of banking products and services including business checking accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit, automotive loans, home equity loans, student loans, online and mobile banking, debit cards, wire transfers, ATM access, and notary services. Members can access their accounts 24/7 through mobile and online platforms, with direct deposit, e-statements, and fraud monitoring on debit cards. The institution emphasizes member benefits and competitive rates as core differentiators in the market. Members Financial distinguishes itself through its credit union structure, which typically means member-owned governance and dividend-earning accounts rather than traditional bank profit models. The organization actively promotes digital banking convenience alongside in-branch services, and recently expanded into business banking products. Its long operational history in the region and acquisition of another credit union demonstrate growth and stability. As a regional credit union, Members Financial is best suited for individuals in the Midland, Texas area seeking relationship-based banking with competitive rates and member-focused service. However, geographic membership restrictions common to credit unions may limit access to those who qualify (employment, residency, or family connections). The website lacks specific information about rate competitiveness, loan terms, or membership eligibility criteria, making direct comparison with other institutions difficult.
pros: Federally chartered credit union with 85+ years of operational history since 1940
Member-owned structure typically results in dividend-earning accounts and profit-sharing benefits
24/7 mobile and online banking access with dedicated mobile app for iOS and Android
Comprehensive loan products including automotive, home equity, and student loans
Business banking products newly available including business checking and money market accounts
24/7 fraud monitoring on all debit cards for enhanced security
Multiple service channels: in-branch, online, mobile, and ATM access
cons: Geographic membership restrictions likely limit eligibility to Midland area residents or employees of qualifying organizations
Website provides no specific information about APR ranges, interest rates, or fee structures for any products
Limited information about loan approval requirements, terms, or qualification criteria
No mention of extended service hours or branch locations beyond phone number
No information about whether the credit union participates in shared branching or surcharge-free ATM networks
best_for: Midland, Texas area residents seeking a community-focused credit union with relationship banking
Business owners and entrepreneurs in the Permian Basin needing business checking and savings products
Current or former Shell Oil Company employees and their families eligible for membership
Borrowers seeking home equity, auto, or student loans from a member-owned institution
diagnosis: Members Financial FCU is best for Midland-area residents and qualifying members seeking a traditional credit union with member-owned benefits, comprehensive banking products, and digital access. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility is typically restricted to geographic location or employer affiliation, and the website lacks transparent information about rates, fees, and loan terms needed to evaluate competitiveness.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Members Financial FCU is a federally chartered credit union serving Midland, Texas since 1940, offering checking, savings, and loans.
